name: S3 Monitor
description: Monitor an S3 bucket prefix for new objects and trigger jobs when matching objects are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new objects are detected in the monitored S3 bucket prefix

outputs.description: Passes object information (bucket, key, size, etag, last_modified) to triggered jobs via run_config

bucket_name.label: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: Name of the S3 bucket to monitor

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: S3 key prefix to scope monitoring (e.g., 'incoming/' or 'data/2024/')

key_pattern.label: Key Pattern
key_pattern.description: Regex pattern to match object keys relative to the prefix (e.g., '.*\.parquet$')

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when objects are detected

region_name.label: AWS Region
region_name.description: AWS region name (e.g., 'us-east-1'). Uses default boto3 region if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
